item.title: Fan Favorite: Great American Authors | Edgar Allan Poe: Master of Macabre
item.description: In February 1826, 17-year-old Edgar Allan Poe was a promising student at the University of Virginia. But within a few months, gambling debts forced him to abandon his studies. It was just one of many setbacks Poe endured in a life marked by financial struggle, alcoholism, and personal tragedy. But Poe launched a remarkable career in writing, helping to establish American literature with a bold, new voice... Feed: https://rss.art19.com/american-history-tellers

item.title: Twlight Zone Accident | Night for Night
item.description: Production on John Landis’ segment of Twilight Zone: The Movie reaches its dramatic finale. Audible subscribers can listen to all episodes of American Scandal ad-free right now. Join Audible today by downloading the Audible app. See Privacy Policy at https://art19.com/privacy and California Privacy Notice at https://art19.com/privacy#do-not-sell-my-info. Feed: https://rss.art19.com/american-scandal
